objective: Make the official Fallout: New Vegas Ultimate Edition corpus playable through the normal OpenMW load-game path, in flat mode first, with Mads VR layered last and no regression hidden by synthetic proof paths.

currentTruth.reason: No current committed runtime has durably loaded exact Save330 through the normal load-game path and produced an admissible gameplay frame.
validOfflineWork: exact Save330 size and SHA-256 lock
complete structural Save330 accounting plus exact Player movement-prefix parsing and deterministic tests
native FalloutNV.esm Player NPC_ 0x00000007 and ACHR 0x00000014 identity resolution
engine-derived Save330 placement in authored WastelandNV CELL 0x000E1AA7 at grid (-18,-1)
save-backed game hour 14.215002059936523 and current weather 0x001237D7 / NVWastelandGS
pinned retail Save330 screenshot oracle and fail-closed side-by-side candidate gate
retail GMST oracle values with raw float/integer bytes
source inspection, compilation, and unit tests
diagnosticOnly: radius/grid cell-load logs without natural traversal
discarded: fnv-cell-stats-smoke-20260718-213158 and every visual, gameplay, streaming, or latency conclusion from it

nonNegotiableRules: No OpenMW, OpenMW VR, retail client, browser, or desktop launch without explicit user authorization in the current conversation.
No --start, --new-game, script-run, PositionCell, teleport, staged actor, neutralization, or forced proof state may contribute parity credit.
No uncommitted binary may be promoted or used for an acceptance percentage.
No evidence counts unless its files exist, hashes match, and the manifest locks source commit, binary, config, ordered content, data roots, and input save.
Any black/white pixels, missing world geometry, bad alpha, shader corruption, or disappearing set piece stops the slice immediately and rolls back to the last renderer-green commit.
Renderer, gameplay, and VR changes are isolated into separate commits; a slice cannot mix those boundaries.
Flat gameplay must be green before any VR parity work resumes.

phases.name: Contain and account
outputs: zero openmw/openmw_vr processes
temporary synthetic benchmark deleted
all streaming/profile edits from the invalid run rolled back
invalid incident recorded in catalog/fnv-flat-acceptance-ledger.json
missing acceptance evidence revoked
certified playable parity reset to zero

phases.name: Lock the pristine renderer boundary
actions: diff every renderer, GUI shader, runtime resource, shaders.yaml, and graphics setting against baseline commit 2ed153af06 and the pristine Mads package
separate the GUI filename compatibility change from world rendering
keep the MyGUI gui.vert/gui.frag filename correction; it is the only renderer-source delta and points at the packaged shaders

restore the known working visual boundary: viewing distance 10000, load unsupported NIF files true, distant terrain false, object paging false, object paging active grid false, force shaders false, environment-map lighting false, and shadows false
remove the four forced FNV sky-model overrides until SkyShaderProperty is implemented
lock ordinary launch routing to local/openmw-pristine-mads-33568a and reject the old openmw-fo4guard and 6a5576 recovery defaults

use D:/Modlists/fnv/openmw-config/flat-ui-proof/20260611_232015/settings.cfg (174 bytes, SHA-256 670F5DC9FDF3EDC199EF4BCD6190BBE5D3DE1090F2C5CE466590E2582F8C582A) as the last known working minimal-settings reference
remove or quarantine every unproven reflection/environment-map/material override
produce a hash manifest of the renderer source, deployed resources, and settings without launching the game
outputs: commit 48fd42f restores the June-safe FNV settings and rejects retired ordinary-launch runtimes
commit 8d5c5e6 adds the deterministic offline renderer boundary audit

catalog/fnv-renderer-boundary-manifest.json passes with exactly one expected renderer-source delta, 62/62 byte-identical deployed shaders, zero shader mismatches, and the exact 174-byte June settings reference
the current generated profile manifest remains explicitly stale and acceptance-ineligible until regenerated for a committed Save330-capable build
phases.gate: The candidate renderer is byte-accounted against pristine Mads; no unexplained world shader/resource/config delta remains. Visual green still requires the later user-authorized Save330 run.

phases.name: Finish native Save330 loading
actions: finish semantic decoding of the remaining save payloads rather than only their envelopes
restore Player FormID 0x00000007 from the winning FalloutNV.esm record
restore worldspace, exterior/interior cell, position, rotation, time, weather, actor state, inventory, equipment, factions, quest stages, globals, and changed references
connect this state to OpenMW's ordinary load-game menu/path
add deterministic cold-reload tests and fail closed on any uncovered required state
outputs: engine commit 89b5dbf4ce structurally accounts for all 3,395,328 Save330 bytes and exposes every semantically opaque range
engine commit aaa3729b28 resolves exact native Player NPC_ 0x00000007 and ACHR 0x00000014 provenance, exact ESM/ESP master order, and fails closed on unsupported state
engine commit 9fbb611ab5 decodes Save330 Player movement bytes 497489+28 as Mojave WRLD 0x000DA726, XYZ (-72392.84375,-1240.19275,8137.58643), and rotation (-0.0643904507,-0.0,2.93332028) radians

engine commit 920f1ef1fc resolves that transform through OpenMW's 4096-unit exterior containment rule to authored CELL 0x000E1AA7 at grid (-18,-1) and fails closed when the WRLD/CELL identity is absent or mismatched
15/15 exact FONVSaveGame tests pass against the pinned Save330 and 11/11 FalloutPlayerState tests pass

2,739,018 save bytes remain explicitly semantically unparsed; the Player ACHR remainder is 5,067 bytes; Save Global Data type 1 stores (-18,0) and remains opaque rather than being invented as the transform-containing cell
phases.gate: A committed flat binary consumes the exact Save330 hash through normal load-game code with no bootstrap flag and produces a complete state manifest.

phases.name: First admissible flat frame
actions: use the exact Save330 embedded 512x320 RGB24 screenshot in oracles/fnv_save330_visual/retail-save330-reference.png as the fixed retail visual oracle
generate a labelled retail/OpenMW side-by-side for every candidate; no log-only, telemetry-only, or standalone OpenMW frame can close the visual gate
require first-person camera plus closely matched position, heading, field of view, crop, time, weather, and visible authored references before pixel/material review
prepare a normal launcher that selects/loads Save330 and nothing else
wait for explicit user authorization before any visible launch
capture exact launch, source, binary, config, content, save, log, and frame provenance
review full-color world geometry, alpha, sky, HUD, player, and nearby actors before exercising gameplay
outputs: parity commit 9fb025f installs schemas and eight regression tests that reject black/white, void, bootstrap, diagnostic, synthetic, injected, dirty-source, wrong-camera, and hash-mismatched OpenMW frames
parity commit 43e3363 pins Save330 game hour 14.215002059936523 and weather 0x001237D7 / NVWastelandGS with exact save offsets and definition-source hashes
oracles/fnv_save330_visual/initial-historical-openmw-rejected.png is the explicit zero-credit baseline: retail Save330 left, historical third-person OpenMW right
retail screenshot-bound camera/FOV/crop and complete visible-reference metadata remain incomplete, so no OpenMW image is currently candidate-eligible
phases.gate: No monochrome output, missing set pieces, bad alpha/reflection bleed, shader errors, substitute player, or invalid camera/world state. Any failure returns to phase 1.

phases.name: Layer flat gameplay slices
orderedSlices: static world, terrain, cells, doors, sky, weather, lighting, materials, alpha
actor and creature identity, placement, grounding, equipment, body, face, hair
idle, locomotion, furniture, AI packages, pathing, hostility, combat animation
HUD, Pip-Boy, inventory, barter, equipment, ammo, quests
dialogue selection, facing, voice, LIP, result scripts, quest progression
combat, hitscan/projectiles, damage, reactions, death, loot
Fallout-only music, ambience, UI, weapon, actor, world, and dialogue audio
phases.gatePerSlice: One focused commit, deterministic tests, normal Save330 cold reload, no renderer regression, durable evidence, and explicit ledger update. A failed prior gate blocks the next slice.

phases.name: Seamless cell transitions
actions: measure normal walking from the Save330 state across exterior boundaries and authored doors
run one uninstrumented visual/feel pass and a separate explicitly authorized profiler pass
A/B preload, cache, paging, asset, physics, and navmesh changes without touching shader/material behavior
compare cold and warm OpenMW crossings with the same retail route
phases.gate: No loading-screen frame on exterior crossings, no recurring error/warning growth, no missing/changed scenery, p95 frame time <= 20 ms, p99 <= 25 ms, max <= 33.333 ms, no two consecutive frames over 20 ms, and crossing p99 penalty <= 5 ms versus steady travel.

phases.name: Mads VR layer last
actions: start from the exact flat-green commit
retain Mads' original hands, red grip ray, input mapping, menu quads, compositor, and shaders
add only the minimum FNV compatibility glue
repeat every flat save/gameplay/transition gate in VR
phases.gate: VR may not mask or replace a flat failure; any menu, pointer, hand, shader, actor, or save regression rolls back the VR-only commit.

percentagePolicy.creditRule: A record or behavioral case earns credit only on the single current promoted Save330-capable binary with durable evidence. Offline parsing and synthetic diagnostics report engineering coverage separately and never increase playable parity.
